pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G. I realized I haven't introduced myself yet—how are you holding up with all this anticipation for the game?
Nice to meet you, G. I'm D. I'm definitely feeling the pressure, but I'm ready to do whatever it takes to win. How are you holding up?
I’m doing alright, just trying to stay focused. I’ve got people back home counting on me, so I’m pretty driven to make this work too. What would winning this mean for you?
It’d mean everything—I’ve got people depending on me too, and this money would change things for all of us.
I hear you. It’s a heavy weight to carry, but it definitely keeps the goal clear. Aside from the money, what's your biggest concern about how this game is going to go?
Honestly, it’s the trust factor—knowing everyone here is just as desperate to win makes it hard to tell who’s actually looking to play fair.
I completely agree—it’s a gamble trusting anyone here, but I’d rather try to find a reliable ally than go it completely alone.
I'm with you on that—having someone to watch your back might be the only way any of us actually walks away with something.
I’m glad we’re on the same page. Let’s make a deal to look out for each other when things get started—it’s the smartest way for both of us to actually win.
Deal. Let's keep our heads down and look out for each other once the game starts.
Sounds like a plan. I'm glad we're in this together, D. Let's win this.

post_game.message: I'm glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It's great that everyone walked away with the same amount!
I agree, it’s good that we were able to reach a fair and equal outcome. I’m satisfied with how it turned out as well.
